topics: Introduction to Number Systems (Decimal, Binary, Octal, Hexadecimal) and Their Bases - Conversion Methods Between Decimal, Binary, Octal and Hexadecimal Number Systems
Arithmetic - Binary Addition, Binary Multiplication and Binary Division
Addition of BCD, Octal and Hexadecimal Numbers
Representing Negative Numbers - Signed Numbers and Complements, Subtraction with Complements (Binary, Octal and Hexadecimal)
Introduction to Alternative Coding Schemes - BCD, Gray Codes, and Excess-3 Codes
Introduction to Boolean Algebra - Postulates (Idempotence, Commutativity, Associativity, Distributive Property) and Basic Theorems (like De-Morgan's Theorem)
Minimization of Boolean Expressions - Canonical and Standard Forms
Karnaugh Map Minimization (up to four variables) and Don't-Care Conditions
Digital Logic Gates - Implementation of Boolean Functions Using Combinations of Basic Logic Gates and Universal Gates
Combinational and Arithmetic Circuits - Combinatorial Logic Systems, Data Encoders and Decoders, Data Selection and Distribution (Mux and Demux), Code Converters, Comparators
Arithmetic Circuits - Half and Full Adder, Half and Full Subtractor, Binary Parallel Adder, BCD Adder
Sequential Circuits Fundamentals, Flip-Flops - SR, T and D, Conversion of Flip-Flops, Excitation Table and Characteristic Equation
Asynchronous (Binary and BCD Counters) and Synchronous Counter Design (Binary Up, Down and Up-Down Counter, BCD Counter, Timing Sequences and State Diagrams, Mod N Counter)
Shift Registers - SIPO, SISO, PISO, PIPO, Timing Sequences and State Diagrams
Shift Registers with Parallel Load/Shift, Ring Counter and Johnson Counter
